title: There isn't a single consumer Wi-Fi router that is 100% American-made - Engadget
summary: Link met with the FCC to secure conditional approva l for its routers. For instance, the FCC granted popular American router company Netgear a waiver to sell its consumer mesh, mobile, and standalone routers.
